query:
-- 检查是否所有老师都有对应城市角色
SELECT 
  t.name as teacher_name,
  t.city as teacher_city,
  u.roles as user_roles,
  CASE 
    WHEN u.roles LIKE CONCAT('%', t.city, '%') THEN '城市角色已分配'
    WHEN t.city = '' OR t.city IS NULL THEN '无城市信息'
    ELSE '缺少城市角色'
  END as city_role_check
FROM teachers t
JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%老师%'
LIMIT 20;

    WHEN t.city = '' OR t.city IS NULL THEN '无城市信息'
    ELSE '缺少城市角色'
  END as city_role_check
FROM teachers t
JOIN users u ON t.userId = u.id
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%老师%'
LIMIT 20;
